title: Checklist evidence remains unchecked on complete packets
claim: 098/005 documented a deferral note but did not backfill evidence or relabel affected packets as not completion-verified.
counterevidenceSought: Validator policy treating explicit deferral as satisfying completion evidence
alternativeExplanation: 098/005 interpreted the original OR path as permitting a deferral note, but the sampled graph metadata still reports complete/100.
downgradeTrigger: Backfill required checklist evidence or change affected packet completion semantics so unchecked CHK rows are not represented as complete/100.

title: skill_graph_scan source default still points at the deleted singular skills root
